description: Script loading strategy matrix for async/defer optimization

defer.description: Scripts with dependencies that must load in order
defer.reason: Critical packages with dependencies that must maintain load order

async.description: Non-critical scripts that can load independently
async.reason: Optional packages that are only needed for specific pages

sync.reason: No packages require synchronous loading - all can use defer/async

base.reason: Critical - required for all pages, has dependencies

services.reason: Critical - required for most pages, has dependencies on base

modules.reason: Critical - modal system and UI components, has dependencies

ui-advanced.reason: Critical - tables and advanced UI, has dependencies on modules

crud.reason: Critical - CRUD operations, has dependencies on base and services

preferences.reason: Critical - preferences system, has dependencies on base and services

validation.reason: Critical - validation system, has dependencies on base

conditions.reason: Critical - conditions system, has dependencies on base and validation

entity-services.reason: Critical - entity services, has dependencies on base and services

entity-details.reason: Critical - entity details, has dependencies on multiple packages

info-summary.reason: Critical - info summary, has dependencies on base and services

dashboard-widgets.reason: Critical - dashboard widgets, has dependencies on multiple packages

dashboard.reason: Critical - dashboard modules, has dependencies on modules and validation

tag-management.reason: Critical - tag management, has dependencies on multiple packages

cache.reason: Critical - cache system, has dependencies on base and services

helper.reason: Critical - helper functions, has dependencies on base and services

filters.reason: Critical - filter system, embedded in header-system.js

init-system.reason: Critical - initialization system, must load last, has dependencies on base

external-data.reason: Non-critical - only for external data dashboard page

charts.reason: Non-critical - only for pages with charts

system-management.reason: Non-critical - only for system management pages

dev-tools.reason: Non-critical - only for development tools pages

tradingview-charts.reason: Non-critical - only for TradingView chart pages

tradingview-widgets.reason: Non-critical - only for TradingView widget pages

watch-lists.reason: Non-critical - only for watch lists pages (mockup)

notes: All defer scripts maintain load order - they execute in the order they appear in HTML
All async scripts can load in parallel but execute as soon as they're ready
No sync scripts needed - all can use defer/async
External CDN scripts (Bootstrap, Chart.js, etc.) should use defer to maintain order
Optional scripts (required: false) within packages still follow package strategy
